highlights.description: REST API server with Huma and Chi for HTTP API with automatic OpenAPI generation
GraphRAG for relationship-aware market retrieval with knowledge graph traversal
Resilience patterns including retry with exponential backoff and circuit breakers
Structured error types for programmatic error handling across all packages

added.description: REST API server with Huma framework and Chi router
GraphRAG for relationship-aware retrieval with knowledge graph traversal
Retry with exponential backoff and circuit breaker resilience patterns
RAG-based filtering and chunk processing for events and markets
News and web search integration via omniserp
`ask` CLI command for ad-hoc LLM queries with streaming support
Structured error types package with retryable and HTTP status interfaces

changed.description: Updated omniretrieve import path to plexusone organization

documentation.description: Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for key design decisions
Restructured docs/design to docs/specs for better organization
Updated documentation for REST server and new features
Added UTF8 icons to README features section

tests.description: Unit tests for resilience, server, and news packages
Unit tests for RAG store and tools packages
Unit tests for prompts, graphrag, and embedder packages

highlights.description: OmniAgent integration via compiled skill wrapper
Full Polymarket SDK integration for trading support
Cobra CLI with subcommand structure and superforecaster analysis

added.description: Compiled skill wrapper implementing `compiled.Skill` interface
`get_markets` tool for fetching prediction markets with filters
`get_orderbook` tool for order book analysis
`--analyze` CLI flag for superforecaster market analysis
Superforecaster and trade analysis prompts
polymarket-go-sdk integration for full trading support

changed.description: Migrated CLI to Cobra with subcommand structure

tests.description: Unit tests for skill interface compliance and tool definitions

dependencies.description: omniagent v0.7.0 for compiled skill support

highlights.description: Go SDK for building AI trading agents on Polymarket prediction markets
Multi-agent workflow system with portable specs deployable to Claude Code or Go servers

added.description: Polymarket API client for Gamma (markets) and CLOB (trading) APIs
`GetMarkets()` to fetch active prediction markets with filtering
`GetOrderBook()` to fetch order book data for tokens
`GetPrice()`, `GetMidPrice()`, `GetSpread()` for price data
Multi-agent-spec loader for YAML frontmatter markdown agents
Team and deployment JSON configuration parsers
Workflow executor with DAG-based topological sort
LangChainGo integration via omnillm-langchaingo adapter
Agent tools: MarketTool, OrderBookTool, PlaceOrderTool
Three agent specs: market-analyst, superforecaster, trader
Graph workflow: discover → forecast → execute
Deployment configs for Go server and Claude Code
`polymarket-agent` CLI with --demo flag for live market data

documentation.description: README with architecture diagram and quick start guide

tests.description: Integration tests for Polymarket API client
Unit tests for workflow topological sort and execution

dependencies.description: omnillm-core v0.15.0 for LLM provider abstraction
langchaingo v0.1.14 for chains and agents
